title: Apply OPSX migration 005_estructura_academica to test DB

content.What: Applied migration 005_estructura_academica to the test database via Alembic using a temporary ini and verified schema tables exist.
content.Why: Task 2.3 of the OPSX workflow required applying the migration to the test DB to validate the new academic structure before further tasks.
content.Learned: Migration applied successfully and verification confirmed presence of tables carrera, cohorte, materia. Using a temporary alembic.ini for test DB was effective; remember to remove or document tmp_alembic.ini if it's temporary.
